sqlMap.select: SELECT B.theme_id AS themeid, B.theme_name AS themename, B.theme_content AS themecontent, A.theme_used AS themeused, A.theme_default AS themedefault FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_THEME B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.theme_id = #themeId#

SELECT B.theme_id AS theme_id, B.frame_id AS framid, B.frame_name AS framename, A.frame_used AS frameused, A.frame_default AS framedefault FROM TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP A JOIN TBL_PORTAL_FRAME B ON A.theme_id = B.theme_id AND A.frame_id = B.frame_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND A.company_id = #companyId# AND A.theme_id = #themeId#
